name: Carrot Spice Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Quick or Old Fashioned Oatmeal
4 Egg Whites or 1 Tbsp Egg Replacer
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an 8 x 4 or 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with nonstick spray.
3. In a medium bowl, combine dry ingredients except for the 3 tablespoons of oatmeal; mix well.
4. In another medium bowl, combine liquid ingredients and mix just until moistened.
5. Fold in shredded carrots (about 2 medium).
6. Spread mixture evenly in prepared pan.
7. Sprinkle remaining 3 tablespoons of oatmeal on top.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan.
10. Cool completely before storing tightly covered.
This recipe yields 12 slices per loaf.
